intro: What I'm currently building, running, and shipping. Updated when the work changes, not on a schedule.
building: [141 Miles](https://www.141miles.com), a town-by-town Jersey Shore publication with an AI-written newsletter pipeline. A self-hosted bylines archive at [keithrobrien.com/bylines](https://www.keithrobrien.com/bylines) replacing my old Authory account.
